verifyAsym(AsymmetricKey, AsymAlgorithmParameters, byte[], byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.crypto.ExtCrypto
Verifies if the signature is correct.

Verifies if the signature is correct.
verifyLast() - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.printer.Printer
Compares the hash value of the save txt and the last content's, if it matches, this method will return true, which means the consistency of the content after power shut down occasionally.
verifyOfflinePIN(Key, String, byte[], RSAKey, byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.pinentry.PINEntry
Verifies offline PIN.
VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.futurex.FutureXErrorCode
[-0x00018033] VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED
